name: csr-final-project
description: **Tech Stack Detected:** - **Framework**: React 18 with Vite build tool - **Styling System**: Tailwind CSS with custom design system and utility classes - **Icon Library**: React Icons (Feather Icons) - outline style icons - **Animation Library**: Framer Motion for smooth interactions and page transitions - **Asset Folders**: `public/` for static assets, `src/assets/` for component assets - **Font**: Inter (Google Fonts) with fallback to system sans-serif
